# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment that pulls our application image from Docker Hub. Use the latest tag so we always get the newest version automatically. This is for our development environment where we want continuous updates without manual intervention.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: app-deployment
  namespace: development
  labels:
    app: myapp
    environment: development
spec:
  replicas: 2
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: myapp
      environment: development
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: myapp
        environment: development
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: app-service-account
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10000
        fsGroup: 10000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
      - name: app
        image: yourdockerhubusername/yourapp:latest
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 10000
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          protocol: TCP
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: 8080
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 3
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: 8080
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
          timeoutSeconds: 3
          failureThreshold: 3
        volumeMounts:
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
        - name: cache
          mountPath: /app/cache
        env:
        - name: ENVIRONMENT
          value: "development"
        - name: LOG_LEVEL
          value: "debug"
      volumes:
      - name: tmp
        emptyDir: {}
      - name: cache
        emptyDir: {}
      automountServiceAccountToken: true
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: app-service-account
  namespace: development
automountServiceAccountToken: true
